project_type: Next.js 15 app with Firebase Firestore backend, Indonesian CV portal
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to validate no compile errors. Manual verification of UI features.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is via `npm run build`. External APIs (OCR.space, MyMemory, Google Translate) used at runtime.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Code follows 'use client' pattern, uses Tailwind CSS utility classes with custom classes (card, btn-primary, btn-secondary, input-field, form-label).
key_patterns: Pages in src/app/admin/*, components in src/components/*, libs in src/lib/*. Uses useAuth() hook for auth. Firestore collection 'candidates'. Admin pages check userData.role === 'admin'. UI uses card class for sections, grid layouts, input-field/form-label for forms.
directory_structure: src/app/admin/ contains admin pages (candidates, edit/[id], import, cv, settings, setup). src/app/api/ for API routes. src/components/ for shared components. src/lib/ for utilities (firebase, translateHelper). src/context/ for AuthContext.
